message:
fix(stream): Peekable::size_hint returns (0, Some(0)) after cached exhaustion instead of delegating to inner

src/stream/peekable.rs — size_hint() was delegating to the inner stream
even after the peekable had cached an Exhausted state, meaning a
misbehaving inner stream could report a non-zero size hint after the
peekable already observed EOF. Now uses a match on the cached state:
Exhausted returns (0, Some(0)), Empty delegates to inner, and Item(_)
adds 1 to inner's bounds with saturating arithmetic. Adds
StaleExhaustedHintStream test fixture (a stream that returns None from
poll_next but reports (42, None) from size_hint) and a test
size_hint_fail_closed_after_cached_exhaustion verifying the peekable
returns the correct (0, Some(0)) regardless of the inner stream's
misbehavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
